case_title: ZAHID SHAIKH DBA SUTTER LARKIN HOTEL VS. DON RANDLE ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RANDLE, DON BOLEN, LA DAWN

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAHID SHAIKH DBA SUTTER LARKIN HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT RANDLE, DON BOLEN, LA DAWN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAHID SHAIKH DBA SUTTER LARKIN HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDLE, DON BOLEN, LA DAWN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1048 LARKIN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 - UNIT 25, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
